creator: onatan@gmail.com
text:
This port upgrades security/metasploit-devel to 3.0.
Please retire security/metasploit and change security/metasploit-devel to security/metasploit.
PLIST is created dynamically, to save the ports tree a large pkg-plist file.
Please remember to update LEGAL (s/metasploit-devel/metasploit/)
What was formerly known as msfwx is now known as msfgui. It is still not done, and carries a heavy baggage (X11), so its still "undocumented".

How-To-Repeat: N/A
